phrases.summary: The text states that Zerubbabel had a child named Abihud, indicating that Zerubbabel is Abihud’s parent in the genealogy.
The text states that Abihud had a child named Eliakim, establishing a parent-child relationship in the genealogy.
The text states that Eliakim had a child named Azor, continuing the genealogical line by describing Eliakim as Azor’s parent.
